# technitium_admin_permission (Resource)

Manages admin permissions for a section on a Technitium DNS Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "technitium_admin_permission" "operators_zones" {
  section           = "Zones"
  user_permissions  = "ops-admin|true|true|false"
  group_permissions = "operators|true|true|false"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `section` (String) The permission section name.

### Optional

- `group_permissions` (String) Pipe-delimited group permissions: name|canView|canModify|canDelete. Multiple entries separated by pipes. Includes server defaults.
- `user_permissions` (String) Pipe-delimited user permissions: username|canView|canModify|canDelete. Multiple entries separated by pipes.
